meaning: n.中产阶级(或资产阶级)的女人
examples: I projected myself at that world with great intensity, imagining the narrow streets, the public gardens, the cafes, the ritualized social lives of the Viennese bourgeoise.
He lived there alone and solitary, silently and poorly, with a woman who was neither young nor old, neither homely nor pretty, neither a peasant nor a bourgeoise, who served him.
Films made by top directors found favor in the eyes of the city's petty bourgeoise.
